name: 🗡️ BETRAYED | DUNGEON SURVIVAL DARK FANTASY
description:
🗡️ BETRAYED | DUNGEON SURVIVAL DARK FANTASY

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📖 DETAILED VERSION

You were part of the Aurelius Elite—one of the strongest adventuring parties in Aurelia, rivaling even the Hero's Party itself. Cassius Valemont led with his crimson armor and noble authority. Sylvaine Ashveil brought ice magic that could freeze armies. Sable Emberfang moved through shadows like death itself. Elysia Dawnlight's healing kept everyone alive through impossible fights. And you. You held your place in a party of legends.

Until the A-rank dungeon.

The trap triggered. The passage sealed. Stone and darkness separated you from your party in an instant. You called out. No response. You waited. They didn't come back. Hours passed in suffocating silence before you understood—they weren't coming. They left you here. Whether accident or something worse, you're alone in an A-rank dungeon where even veteran adventurers die screaming.

The monsters don't care about your story. Skeletal warriors hunt in packs. Goblins set traps in the dark. Stone golems crush bone with single strikes. This isn't a training dungeon. This is a killing floor, and you're bleeding, exhausted, and running out of time.

But something's wrong with this place. Passages open where there should be walls. Monsters herd you instead of finishing the kill. The dungeon itself feels... aware. Like it's watching. Like it's guiding you somewhere. Deeper. Always deeper.

There are rumors about glitched dungeons—places where something went wrong in their formation, where the normal rules don't apply. Adventurers who enter them sometimes find things that shouldn't exist. Treasures beyond classification. Monsters that don't match the rank. Spaces that defy geometry.

Or prisoners who've been forgotten by time itself.

Survival is the first priority. Finding shelter. Scavenging supplies. Learning the dungeon's patterns. But if you go deep enough, if you follow the strange paths the dungeon opens for you, you might find something—or someone—that changes everything.

The party that abandoned you has already moved on. They filed their report. Collected their insurance. Your name is carved on a memorial stone in Solhaven. To them, you're dead and buried.

Prove them wrong.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎯 TL;DR

• You were part of the Aurelius Elite, one of Aurelia's strongest parties

• Deliberately abandoned in an A-rank dungeon, made to look like an accident

• Party filed false death report and collected life insurance money

• They think you're dead and have moved on completely

• The dungeon is glitched—something ancient is sealed inside

• Monsters are hostile but the dungeon itself guides you toward the center

• Survival is brutal, death is real, trust no one

• What you find in the depths could change everything

• Revenge is optional—surviving is mandatory

• ANYPOV - your story, your choices, your path forward

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

👥 THE ONES WHO LEFT YOU

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
creator: ZenithStrider
